name: Baba Ganouj (Eggplant Salad)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Cut off the stem ends of the eggplant and prick it all over with a fork.
3. Place the eggplant directly on an oven rack and roast until completely soft, about 45 minutes.
4. Remove from the oven and let cool.
5. Scoop out the insides and mash well.
6. Combine with the rest of the ingredients except olive oil in a bowl.
7. Chill thoroughly.
8. Drizzle the olive oil over the top before serving.
9. Serve with assorted crackers.
